select.if: SELECT emplyr_id AS id, user_nm AS name, ihidnum AS ihidNum, password AS password, email_adres AS email, 'USR' AS userSe, orgnzt_id AS orgnztId, esntl_id AS uniqId FROM TB_EMPLYR_INFO WHERE emplyr_id = #{id} AND password = #{password} AND emplyr_sttus_code = 'P'

SELECT mber_id AS id, mber_nm AS name, ihidnum AS ihidNum, password AS password, mber_email_adres AS email, 'GNR' AS userSe, '-' AS orgnztId, esntl_id AS uniqId FROM TB_GNRL_MBER WHERE mber_id = #{id} AND password = #{password} AND mber_sttus = 'P'

SELECT entrprs_mber_id AS id, cmpny_nm AS name, applcnt_ihidnum AS ihidNum, entrprs_mber_password AS password, applcnt_email_adres AS email, 'ENT' AS userSe, '-' AS orgnztId, esntl_id AS uniqId FROM TB_ENTRPRS_MBER WHERE entrprs_mber_id = #{id} AND entrprs_mber_password = #{password} AND entrprs_mber_sttus = 'P'
SELECT emplyr_id AS id FROM TB_EMPLYR_INFO WHERE user_nm = #{name} AND email_adres = #{email} AND emplyr_sttus_code = 'P'
SELECT mber_id AS id FROM TB_GNRL_MBER WHERE mber_nm = #{name} AND mber_email_adres = #{email} AND mber_sttus = 'P'
SELECT entrprs_mber_id AS id FROM TB_ENTRPRS_MBER WHERE cmpny_nm = #{name} AND applcnt_email_adres = #{email} AND entrprs_mber_sttus = 'P'
SELECT password AS password FROM TB_EMPLYR_INFO WHERE emplyr_id = #{id} AND user_nm = #{name} AND email_adres = #{email} AND emplyr_sttus_code = 'P'
SELECT password AS password FROM TB_GNRL_MBER WHERE mber_id = #{id} AND mber_nm = #{name} AND mber_email_adres = #{email} AND mber_sttus = 'P'

update.if: UPDATE TB_EMPLYR_INFO SET password = #{password} WHERE emplyr_id = #{id}
UPDATE TB_GNRL_MBER SET password = #{password} WHERE mber_id = #{id}
